commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ac1aa41c58f34793cf99f3a0a6bf7d8e8eede75a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a QQBot-owned setup-guidance helper and uses it for missing-credential, access-token, and API network error messages plus focused string tests.

PR surface: Source +52, Tests +54. Total +106 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current token fetch network failures include `access_token`, and current `withTokenRetry` retries non-ApiError failures only when the message contains `401`, `token`, or `access_token`; the PR removes that marker from this path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor or maintainer action for both a narrow retry-preservation repair and external real behavior proof, so it is not automation-complete.

target.title: feat(qqbot): add actionable setup error guidance
target.body:
## Summary

- Centralize QQBot setup/auth/network guidance in a small plugin-owned helper.
- Replace terse QQBot missing-config, token, and API network errors with actionable messages that include credentials guidance and docs links.
- Keep named-account guidance account-aware by pointing to `channels.qqbot.accounts.<id>.*` instead of default-only env vars.

Closes #65868

## Verification

- `git diff --no-index --check extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/token.ts.upstream extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/token.ts`
- `git diff --no-index --check extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/token.test.ts.upstream extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/token.test.ts`
- `git diff --no-index --check extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/api-client.ts.upstream extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/api-client.ts`
- `git diff --no-index --check extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/gateway.ts.upstream extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/gateway.ts`
- `git diff --no-index --check extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/outbound.ts.upstream extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/outbound.ts`
- `git diff --no-index --check /dev/null extensions/qqbot/src/engine/utils/setup-guidance.ts`
- `git diff --no-index --check /dev/null extensions/qqbot/src/engine/utils/setup-guidance.test.ts`

Not run: focused vitest, `oxfmt`, and `oxlint` could not be run locally because this environment cannot complete a full OpenClaw checkout, and no standalone formatter/linter binaries are available here.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: QQBot setup, token, and network failures now provide actionable credential guidance, QQ Open Platform and docs links, and account-aware named-account config paths instead of terse/raw messages.

Real environment tested: API-authored fork branch from current upstream `main` raw files. A full local OpenClaw checkout was attempted earlier in this session, but repository fetch disconnected before dependencies and extension tests could be started.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

- `git diff --no-index --check extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/token.ts.upstream extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/token.ts`
- `git diff --no-index --check extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/token.test.ts.upstream extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/token.test.ts`
- `git diff --no-index --check extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/api-client.ts.upstream extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/api-client.ts`
- `git diff --no-index --check extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/gateway.ts.upstream extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/gateway.ts`
- `git diff --no-index --check extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/outbound.ts.upstream extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/outbound.ts`
- `git diff --no-index --check /dev/null extensions/qqbot/src/engine/utils/setup-guidance.ts`
- `git diff --no-index --check /dev/null extensions/qqbot/src/engine/utils/setup-guidance.test.ts`

Evidence after fix:

- `extensions/qqbot/src/engine/utils/setup-guidance.ts` centralizes default-account env var guidance, named-account config-key guidance, token error text, and network troubleshooting text.
- `extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/token.ts` now wraps missing-token and token-network failures with actionable QQBot guidance while preserving raw response/cause details.
- `extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/api-client.ts`, `gateway.ts`, and `messaging/outbound.ts` reuse the helper for API network and missing-credential paths.
- `extensions/qqbot/src/engine/utils/setup-guidance.test.ts` and `token.test.ts` cover the new guidance strings.

Observed result after fix: The added expectations verify default account setup errors mention `QQBOT_APP_ID` / `QQBOT_CLIENT_SECRET`, named accounts mention `channels.qqbot.accounts.<id>.*`, token errors keep the raw response, and network guidance mentions IP whitelist troubleshooting.

What was not tested: Focused extension vitest, live QQBot credentials, `oxfmt`, and `oxlint` were not run because this environment could not complete repository checkout and does not have standalone repo tooling available.
target.author: leno23

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
